summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of /care page (CareSoulPage.jsx) after syntax error fix. All P0/P1/P2 requirements verified with logged-in user (dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123) with pet Mojo (Indie breed). All critical features pass.

minor.issue: TypeError: Failed to fetch for pet loading — appears to be WebSocket related via emergent-main.js (not critical, page still loads correctly)
Some non-critical resources returning 404 (likely images/assets). Page functions correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test score update via Q&A because Mojo already has all questions answered (94% score). Drawer opens correctly showing 'All current questions answered for Mojo'. The score update flow itself cannot be exercised unless a new/lower-score pet is used.

issues: Date picker uses browser native <input type='date'> (mm/dd/yyyy format). Expected per code, but not a custom Shadcn calendar component if that was expected.

action_items: Minor: Add data-testid attributes to CelebrateServiceCard in CareConciergeSection.jsx for better testability
Minor: PetHomePage has 'Each child in a list should have a unique key prop' React warning — fix key prop in PetHomePage list rendering
critical_code_review_comments: PetHomePage missing key prop in list render — React warning in console
CareConciergeSection uses CelebrateServiceCard which has no data-testid — add for testability
context_for_next_testing_agent: All /care page P0/P1/P2 tests pass with dipali@clubconcierge.in / test123. Note: 'aditya/lola4304' are admin credentials for /admin page only. Member login uses email. Mojo (Indie, 94% soul score, long silky coat, Chicken allergy) is the active pet. WellnessProfile score update via Q&A cannot be exercised since Mojo has all questions answered. Test data: CareCategoryStrip uses data-testid='care-category-{id}' (not 'care-cat-'). Grooming DimExpanded = data-testid='care-dim-expanded-grooming'. Booking flow has 5 steps, step 5 has native date input.

p0_p1_p2_results.P0_care_page_loads: PASS — CareHero with Mojo photo, soul chips (Coat: long silky, Allergy: Chicken), Mira quote, category strip, wellness profile, tab bar all visible
p0_p1_p2_results.P0_mira_imagines_fallback: PASS — Section shows REAL AI-scored picks (Vet Appointment Coordination 98, Nutrition Consultation 97, etc). Section is never empty.
p0_p1_p2_results.P0_grooming_path_coat_coat: PASS — Shows 'long, silky coat' with NO double text
p0_p1_p2_results.P0_wellness_profile_subtitle: PASS — Dynamic subtitle: 'Answer a few more · Mojo's profile is looking great' (at 94% score)
p0_p1_p2_results.P1_wellness_drawer: PASS — Opens on click showing 94% score, progress bar, dynamic subtitle, Close button works
p0_p1_p2_results.P1_care_products_tab_dim_grid: PASS — 8 dimension cards found, clicking Grooming opens DimExpanded with products and Mira quote
p0_p1_p2_results.P2_pet_photo_in_hero: PASS — Photo src = '/api/pet-photo/pet-mojo-7327ad56' (real photo, not dog emoji)
p0_p1_p2_results.P2_category_strip_8_pills: PASS — 8 pills: Grooming, Dental & Paw, Coat & Skin, Wellness, Senior Care, Supplements, Soul Care, Mira's Picks
p0_p1_p2_results.P2_grooming_category_opens_modal: PASS — CareContentModal opens showing 71 products personalized for Mojo's long silky coat
p0_p1_p2_results.P2_booking_flow_date_picker: PASS — 5-step booking flow works, Step 5 has Preferred date input (min: 2026-03-17) + time window selection
p0_p1_p2_results.P2_care_concierge_section: PASS — 'Care, Personally' heading found, service cards with 'Book Mojo's ...' CTAs visible, 'Talk to your Care Concierge →' button present
